Voice Chats

This section provides an introduction to the voice chat capabilities that games can use on Xbox Live. The Xbox Live libraries provide both high- and low-level access to voice processing functionality. Overviews of these capabilities appear in the following topics.

  • How Do Voice Chats Work?
  • The Xbox High-Level Voice (XHV) Library
  • Low-Level Voice Processing
